summary: Python script excellent: clean design, error handling, clear separation of concerns. CRITICAL FLAW: actions/checkout@v4 not pinned to full 40-char SHA per stated requirement—security/best practice violation. Workflow duplication: CONFIG fallback logic repeated in 'Run secret rotation validator' and 'Run validator in markdown format' steps—refactor to env var. Type hints use bare list/dict instead of List[Secret]/Dict[str, Any]. Cannot ship without action SHA pinning fix.
